summary: Fix PR review findings around CLI naming, tail single-poll behavior, bounded OAuth shutdown, and terminal detection fallback.
reason: Greptile review found generated runtime strings and storage paths using the Go module path instead of the shipped binary name, a documented --follow=false flag that never exited, and two defensive runtime issues. These local fixes keep the published CLI usable while preserving module imports for builds.
validated_outcome: go test ./... passed; cli-printing-press publish validate --dir . --json passed; built google-business-profile-pp-cli help/version now show google-business-profile-pp-cli, doctor reports ~/.config/google-business-profile-pp-cli plus ~/.local/share/google-business-profile-pp-cli/data.db, and tail --follow=false exits after one poll.
